rationale: Educ. Code §30.101 governs state available school fund apportionment for TJJD children. It does not reference the homestead exemption or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption amount creates no direct conflict.
quote: The purpose of this subchapter is to provide the state available school fund apportionment to children committed to the Texas Juvenile Justice Department.
_note: No textual or operational link between this statute and the homestead exemption amount; no conflict detected.
